name: TC009 - Result Accuracy: Flight Information Consistency

steps.name: Wait for selector locator('form, [role="search"], .flight-search-form, input[name*="departure"], input[placeholder*="From"], input[placeholder*="Where"]').first()
Click locator('button:has-text("Choose trip type"), button:has-text("Trip type"), button:has-text("Choose trip"), [aria-label*="trip"]').first()
